mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO `food-system`.order_detail (name, image, order_id, dish_id, number, amount, price, subtotal) VALUES
(#{item.name}, #{item.image}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.dishId}, #{item.number}, #{item.amount}, #{item.price}, #{item.subtotal})
mapper.select: SELECT SUM(amount * number) FROM `food-system`.order_detail WHERE order_id = #{orderId};
